## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss event proposals and partnerships for GrowthX and Surge, focusing on Seattle and San Francisco events.](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge paused San Francisco team dinner plans for October; future events may require quick turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Seattle happy hour event shifted focus to more hip, less formal venue for 30-40 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [GrowthX seeking Acquire's help to find co-hosts for Surge events, emphasizing technical ML researchers or major AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Ongoing communication crucial due to client's evolving preferences and potential sudden changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

## Topics

### San Francisco Event Update

  - [Original Oct 27-28 event postponed; client wants to pause for now](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [No specific reason given, possibly due to timing or logistics](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Client expressed trust in Acquire's ability to deliver great results](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Future events may require $5,000-$7,500 budget range for property rentals](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Acquire to prepare options in this range for quick deployment](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### Seattle Happy Hour Event

  - [Shifted from formal dinner to hip happy hour setting](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Expected attendance: 30-40 people (up from initial 20)](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Previous venue (Cannelly) deemed too fancy for the engineering crowd](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Seeking "hip, fun, exclusive, hard to get into, cool, Michelin-rated" options](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Haley to update proposal for passed canapés instead of sit-down dinner](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Surge Co-Host Partnership

  - [GrowthX seeking Acquire's help to find co-hosts for Surge events](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Focus on technical ML researchers or major AI model producers](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Potential co-hosts: CTOs of major AI companies, interesting ML researchers](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Goal: Brand recognition and building client relationships, not product partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Liz to provide one-pager with event details and talking points](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Future Event Planning

  - [San Francisco event still in consideration, no set date](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [New York event planned, working with local company](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Open to co-host suggestions that could lead to November event](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Acquire to provide updated Seattle venue options by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Liz to update one-pager with co-host talking points and attendee information](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Acquire to compile list of potential co-hosts based on provided criteria](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Gloria to meet with Surge team next Thursday; requests any updates by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Ongoing communication to manage evolving client preferences and potential changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZM3UysoHWrsShX89JvVmFUuisEH7D9Dv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
